dimension_results.raw_response:
ISSUE_1_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The first issue correctly identifies that the receipt is in USD rather than EUR (the local currency for Austria). This is verified in the extracted data which shows "currency": "USD" and "total_amount": 800. The compliance rule states "Document must show total amount in local currency" which for Austria would be EUR.

ISSUE_2_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The second issue correctly identifies that training expenses are subject to gross-up according to the compliance rules. This matches the provided compliance policy which states "Training" expenses are subject to gross-up with the rule "All expenses that has been approved by the client as a business expense will be NET to the employee (grossed up if not tax free)".

ISSUE_3_VALIDATION_SCORE: 100 - The third issue correctly identifies that training expenses require manager approval. This matches the compliance policy which explicitly states "Training expenses require the approval of the direct manager".

CONFIDENCE: 100

ISSUES: None detected

SUMMARY: The AI response accurately identifies three compliance issues based on the provided receipt data and compliance rules. All issues are properly supported by the information in the extracted data and compliance rules. There are no hallucinations or fabricated information in the response.
